calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.551.4997, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted, no opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; No other appearances.

Petitioner stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
